text: I still cry when I think about losing them.
Nothing feels the same anymore; I feel hollow inside.
We finally got the news we were hoping for—I'm over the moon!
The whole team celebrated after the win—it was such a great day.
I could hold their hand forever—I never want this feeling to end.
You mean everything to me. I'm so grateful you're in my life.
This is unacceptable. I'm done being treated like this!
Stop talking over me—I am furious right now.
I can't shake the feeling that something terrible will happen.
My heart races every time I step into that room.
Wait—what?! I did not see that coming at all.
They just announced the results and my jaw dropped.
